link.description: This section contains my literary work focusing on the connections between war, technology, and human consciousness. Using speculative fiction, satire, and dystopia, these narratives observe how ideology and media influence our perception of reality. The stories often combine philosophical themes with dark humor to examine unconventional narrative structures. I am interested in emerging technologies, particularly the role of AI in changing human identity. You are welcome to explore these texts and the surreal elements within our modern environment.
